backstory.original: Tyril grew up in the wilds around his home village as the apprentice to the spiritual leader. After an accident regarding his large stature, Tyril fled the village to become a sword for hire. His regret informs his transformations and he prefers to shape-shift into small mammals and rodents.
backstory.display: 泰利尔在他家乡周围的荒野中长大，是精神领袖的学徒。在一次与他高大身材有关的事故后，泰瑞尔逃离村庄成为了一名佣兵。他对事故的悔恨也影响了他的变身，让他更喜欢变化为小型哺乳动物和啮齿动物。

description.original: Tyril smacks the closest enemy with his staff.
description.display: 泰利尔用他的手杖猛砸距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Tyril hits a line of enemies with a brilliant and deadly beam of light.
description.display: 泰利尔用一道耀眼而致命的光束攻击一条直线上的敌人。

longDescription.original: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from Tyril's off-hand and hits all enemies in a line, targetting a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 泰利尔的副手发出一道耀眼的光束，瞄准一名随机敌人并攻击该直线上的所有敌人。

description.desc: Increase the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%. This amount is reduced by $(list_or reduce_per_num_targets)% depending on the number of adjacent Champions
所有勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。每有一位勇士与其同列，此数值将降低 $(list_or reduce_per_num_targets)%

specializationDescription.original: Tyril draws upon a beam of pure moonlight, increasing the damage of all Champions. He also eventually gains the ability to heal those near him over time.
specializationDescription.display: 泰利尔召唤一道纯净的月光，使所有勇士的伤害提高。随着时间的推移，他将最终获得治愈附近盟友的能力。

tipText.original: Tyril increases your party's damage, but the increase is reduced by each Champion next to him. Keep him on his own to maximize the benefit.
tipText.display: 泰利尔使队伍的伤害提高，但其身边的每位勇士都会削弱此加成。确保他周围无人，以充分利用此增益。

description.desc: Transforms $source into a bear, grants him $amount health points, and increases his overwhelmed point by $amount___3.
将$source转化为一头熊，赋予其 $amount 生命值，并提升其击溃点数 $amount___3 点。

specializationDescription.original: Tyril transforms into a bear and gains additional hit points and damage reduction abilities over time. He also eventually buffs nearby Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 泰利尔变成巨熊，并逐渐获得额外的生命值及伤害减免能力，最终为附近勇士提供增益效果。

tipText.original: Tyril can be an excellent tank. Keep him at the front of your formation to soak up damage.
tipText.display: 泰利尔可以成为出色的坦克。将他放置在阵型前方以抵御伤害。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%。
Increases the Damage of Champions within 2 slots of $source by $amount%
与$source相邻 2 格之内的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害
Heals Champions adjacent to $source for $(amount) every second.
与$source同列的勇士每秒回复 $(amount) 生命值。

tipText.original: Tyril heals those next to him. Place him next to your front-line tanks to help keep them alive longer.
tipText.display: 泰利尔会治疗身边的盟友。将他放置在前线坦克身边，以延长其生命。

description.desc: Reduce damage taken by $source by $(amount). Cannot reduce to below 25% of initial damage.
降低 $(amount) 点$source受到的伤害。数值不能低于原本的 25%

tipText.original: Tyril reduces damage done to himself by a certain amount each hit. Place him at the front of your formation to protect your other Champions.
tipText.display: 泰利尔每次命中都会使自身受到的伤害降低。将他放置在阵型的前线，以保护其他勇士。

description.desc: Increases the damage of good champions by $amount% for each enemy attacking $target and/or each enemy enrage stack.
每有一名攻击$target或使其堆叠怒气的敌人，即提升善良阵营勇士 $amount% 伤害

description.original: It is a druid's duty to care for others.
description.display: 德鲁伊的职责就是照顾他人。

description.original: I shall inspire you as best I can.
description.display: 我将尽我所能鼓舞你们。

description.original: From fleeing apprentice to leader... an improvement, for sure.
description.display: 从逃亡学徒到领袖......这当然是一种进步。

description.original: You may need more aid than I can provide.
A strong mind is just as important as a strong body.
description.display: 强壮的心灵与强壮的身体一样重要。

description.original: There's no need to be frightened.
